## Testing

<!-- How did you test this? Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Docker stack (`docker compose up --build`)
- [ ] Bare metal install
- [ ] Admin UI (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] Not tested (explain why below)

<!-- If not tested, explain. A "not tested" PR can still be merged if the change is low-risk and clearly correct. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Setup script changes are idempotent (safe to re-run)
- [ ] No new packages added without a comment explaining why
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
